title: A Bounded, Thread-Safe Queue
prompt: Finish push() and pop() on the fixed-capacity circular queue below: push must wait (in a while loop, on not_full) while the queue is full, pop must wait (in a while loop, on not_empty) while the queue is empty, and each one must signal the other condition after changing the queue. One producer thread pushes 1 through 10; one consumer thread pops all ten and sums them. Print exactly "Total: 55\n" from main after joining both threads.
